global.title: Trump threatens Iran strikes, says too soon for new direct talks after reporting "great progress"
global.summary: U.S. messaging on Iran remains mixed: President Trump spoke of progress toward a deal while also warning of further strikes if Tehran refuses terms.
global.whyItMatters: This keeps global anxiety high and shapes prayers, preaching, and pastoral care around fear, peace, and uncertainty.

global.title: Hormuz at near standstill as Iran warns ships to keep to its waters
global.summary: Reuters reports shipping through the Strait of Hormuz has fallen to well below 10% of normal levels despite a ceasefire context, signaling ongoing instability.
global.whyItMatters: Disruption here can quickly affect fuel costs, household stress, and the emotional temperature of congregations.

global.title: Immunization coverage
global.summary: The WHO says 13.5 million children in 2025 missed all vaccinations, highlighting a major global health gap among the most vulnerable.
global.whyItMatters: This is a reminder to pray for children, support global mission health work, and keep compassion for vulnerable families before the church.

canadian.title: R E P E A T –Media Advisory -Media accreditation for media events in Houston related to the Crew-13 mission - Cantech Letter
canadian.summary: The Canadian Space Agency announced upcoming media events tied to the Crew-13 mission, including Canadian astronaut Joshua Kutryk.
canadian.whyItMatters: It offers a constructive national story that can encourage wonder, vocation, and gratitude for human creativity and service.

canadian.title: Tariff threats, Pan Am wreckage, most powerful passports: Catch up on the day’s stories - CNN
canadian.summary: CNN’s roundup notes that millions of Americans and Canadians are breathing unhealthy wildfire smoke, alongside broader economic and geopolitical pressures.
canadian.whyItMatters: Air quality and cost-of-living pressures affect families directly and may shape pastoral check-ins, care for seniors, and church event planning.

persecutedChurch.title: Palestinians report settler arson attack on mosque in Tuwani, in the West Bank - The Times of Israel
persecutedChurch.summary: Reports say a mosque in Tuwani was targeted in an arson attack, adding to religious tension and fear in the West Bank.
persecutedChurch.whyItMatters: Pastors can respond with prayer for protection, a clear witness against religious violence, and renewed teaching on loving neighbors.

persecutedChurch.title: A pastor’s lengthy ICE detention leaves his Colorado parishioners torn - The Washington Post
persecutedChurch.summary: The Washington Post describes the prolonged detention of an Anglican pastor in Colorado and the strain it has placed on both him and his congregation.
persecutedChurch.whyItMatters: This highlights how immigration policy can deeply affect local churches, pastoral care, and congregational unity.

leadership.title: Burnout-Proof Leadership Systems: Building Sustainable Executive Performance
leadership.summary: This piece argues that sustainable leadership comes less from personal endurance and more from designing healthier systems, clearer roles, and shared responsibility.
leadership.whyItMatters: A pastor leading staff and volunteers needs structures that prevent exhaustion and help ministry remain faithful over the long haul.

goodNews.title: A Family’s Daring Escape From North Korea ‘to Live and Stand Tall’ - The New York Times
goodNews.summary: A North Korean family, including small children and a pregnant woman, escaped by boat to South Korea after enduring severe hardship and repression.
goodNews.whyItMatters: It is a powerful story of courage, dignity, and the human longing for freedom—useful for prayer, gratitude, and hope.
